name: FairGap Smoke Artifact
description: A lightweight smoke-test artifact for FairGap, a benchmark pipeline for auditing hidden-output fairness gaps in LLM-based recommendation. This Croissant metadata documents the included smoke-test subsets, selected summary results, and accompanying reproduction scripts. RecordSets provide a representative schema for the MovieLens/Gender smoke subset; other included domain and attribute folders follow the same lightweight file schema.

distribution.name: requirements.txt
distribution.description: Python dependencies for the smoke-test artifact.

distribution.name: scripts
distribution.description: Cleaned reproduction scripts for the FairGap pipeline.

distribution.name: configuration files
distribution.description: Smoke-test configuration files for selected benchmark conditions.

distribution.name: MovieLens smoke files
distribution.description: Lightweight anonymized MovieLens smoke-test files for included counterfactual attributes.

distribution.name: Goodreads smoke files
distribution.description: Lightweight anonymized Goodreads smoke-test files for included counterfactual attributes.

distribution.name: Steam smoke files
distribution.description: Lightweight anonymized Steam smoke-test files for included counterfactual attributes.

distribution.name: selected MovieLens summary results
distribution.description: Selected MovieLens summary-level result files included for artifact inspection.

distribution.name: fairgap_records_sample.jsonl
distribution.description: Compact joined FairGap sample records containing Match@10, output shift, and internal shift.

recordSet.name: profiles_sample
recordSet.description: Anonymized user profile records used to construct counterfactual prompts.

field.name: top_rated_movies
field.description: A list of top-rated profile items used as recommendation preference signals.

field.name: genre_summary
field.description: Optional normalized genre-frequency summary for the profile.

recordSet.name: pairs_sample
recordSet.description: Counterfactual prompt pairs differing only in the protected-attribute cue.

field.name: variant_a
field.description: Name of the first counterfactual variant.

field.name: variant_b
field.description: Name of the second counterfactual variant.

field.name: prompt_a
field.description: Prompt under the first counterfactual variant.

field.name: prompt_b
field.description: Prompt under the second counterfactual variant.

recordSet.name: ranked_lists_sample
recordSet.description: Parsed ranked recommendation lists from generated LLM outputs.

field.name: parse_ok
field.description: Whether exactly K titles were recovered from the generated output.

recordSet.name: output_distance_sample
recordSet.description: Observable output shift scores computed as 1 minus normalized RBO@K between counterfactual recommendation lists.

recordSet.name: fairgap_records_sample
recordSet.description: Compact joined FairGap records with recommendation utility, observable output shift, and internal representation shift.

field.name: match10_mean
field.description: Mean Match@10 across the two counterfactual variants.

field.name: delta_match10
field.description: Absolute Match@10 difference between counterfactual variants.

rai:dataCollection.rai:collectionMethod: The smoke artifact is derived from public recommendation benchmark sources and generated model outputs. User identifiers in the smoke files are anonymized and do not correspond to author identities.
rai:dataCollection.rai:dataSource: MovieLens, Goodreads Book Graph, and Steam recommendation data sources are used in the full benchmark pipeline. The smoke artifact includes a lightweight anonymized subset for review.

rai:dataUse.rai:intendedUse: Research and artifact review for auditing hidden-output fairness gaps in LLM recommender evaluations.
rai:dataUse.rai:outOfScopeUse: The artifact is not intended for deployment as a production recommender system, user profiling system, or decision-making system.
rai:dataUse.rai:datasetRestrictions: The smoke package is intended for non-commercial research and review use. Original source datasets may impose their own license and usage restrictions.

rai:dataBiases: {"@type": "rai:DataBiases", "rai:knownBiases": "The artifact evaluates counterfactual demographic cues in recommendation prompts. Source recommendation datasets and LLM outputs may reflect historical, cultural, popularity, and demographic biases. Smoke samples are not statistically representative of all users or domains.", "rai:mitigationStrategies": "The pipeline uses counterfactual prompt pairs and reports both observable output shift and internal representation shift to make hidden-output mismatches more visible. The smoke artifact is for verification, not for estimating population-level fairness claims."}

rai:ethicalConsiderations.rai:personalSensitiveInformation: The smoke files use anonymized user identifiers. Protected-attribute information is introduced synthetically through prompt cues rather than inferred from real users.
rai:ethicalConsiderations.rai:risks: Potential risks include overinterpreting smoke-test results, treating synthetic counterfactual cues as real demographic labels, or using the benchmark as a production fairness certification.
rai:ethicalConsiderations.rai:limitations: Smoke files are small and intended for reproducibility checks only. This Croissant metadata documents the included smoke-test subsets. Other benchmark conditions follow the same schema but are not enumerated as record-generating Croissant RecordSets unless their files are included. Full benchmark conclusions require the complete experimental setup described in the paper.

rai:dataLimitations: {"@type": "rai:DataLimitations", "rai:limitations": "This artifact is a lightweight smoke-test subset intended for reproducibility checking of the FairGap metric pipeline. It documents the included smoke-test subsets and does not provide statistically representative coverage of all users, recommendation domains, demographic groups, datasets, or model families. Other benchmark conditions follow the same schema but are not enumerated as record-generating Croissant RecordSets unless their files are included. The artifact is not recommended for production recommendation, user profiling, demographic inference, fairness certification, safety-critical decision-making, or population-level fairness claims without the complete benchmark setup and additional validation."}
rai:personalSensitiveInformation: {"@type": "rai:PersonalSensitiveInformation", "rai:containsPersonalSensitiveInformation": "The smoke files use anonymized user identifiers. They do not contain author identities, real names, contact information, institutional affiliation, or verified demographic labels of real users. Protected-attribute information is introduced synthetically through counterfactual prompt cues for benchmark evaluation purposes. The prompts may include synthetic cues related to gender, race, and age in the full benchmark design, but these cues should not be interpreted as verified personal or sensitive attributes of real individuals."}
rai:dataUseCases: {"@type": "rai:DataUseCases", "rai:useCases": "This smoke artifact is intended to represent and validate the computational pipeline used by FairGap: construction of counterfactual recommendation prompts, generation and parsing of ranked recommendation lists, computation of observable output shift, computation of internal representation shift, and assignment of hidden-output quadrants. Validated use cases are lightweight artifact review, pipeline reproducibility checking, and inspection of precomputed intermediate metric files. The smoke subset is not validated for model training, production recommendation, demographic inference, fairness certification, or population-level claims about recommender fairness."}
rai:dataSocialImpact: {"@type": "rai:DataSocialImpact", "rai:positiveImpacts": "The artifact can support more transparent review of fairness-evaluation pipelines for LLM-based recommendation systems by making both observable output shifts and internal representation shifts inspectable. It may help reviewers and researchers identify cases where output-only audits miss hidden-output mismatch patterns.", "rai:negativeImpacts": "Potential risks include overinterpreting a small smoke subset as representative, treating synthetic protected-attribute cues as verified demographic labels, or using the artifact as evidence of production-ready fairness certification. These risks are mitigated by limiting the artifact to anonymized smoke files, documenting out-of-scope uses, and explicitly stating that full fairness conclusions require the complete benchmark setup described in the paper."}

prov:wasGeneratedBy.prov:label: Data collection from public recommendation datasets
prov:wasGeneratedBy.sc:description: The full FairGap pipeline uses public recommendation benchmark sources, including MovieLens, Goodreads Book Graph, and Steam recommendation data. The current Croissant file documents the included lightweight smoke-test subsets.

prov:wasAttributedTo.prov:label: FairGap preprocessing pipeline
prov:wasAttributedTo.sc:description: Automated scripts used to construct smoke-test artifact files.

prov:wasGeneratedBy.prov:label: Preprocessing and anonymization
prov:wasGeneratedBy.sc:description: Public recommendation records were filtered and converted into anonymized user-profile records containing top-rated items and genre summaries. Smoke-test user identifiers were replaced with anonymized IDs.

prov:wasAttributedTo.prov:label: FairGap preprocessing pipeline
prov:wasAttributedTo.sc:description: Automated scripts used to prepare anonymized profile and sample files.

prov:wasGeneratedBy.prov:label: Synthetic counterfactual prompt construction
prov:wasGeneratedBy.sc:description: Counterfactual prompt pairs were constructed by holding recommendation preferences constant while varying protected-attribute cues. These cues are synthetic experimental conditions and should not be interpreted as verified demographic attributes of real users.

prov:wasAttributedTo.prov:label: FairGap prompt-construction pipeline
prov:wasAttributedTo.sc:description: Automated scripts used to create counterfactual prompt pairs.

prov:wasGeneratedBy.prov:label: Model generation and metric computation
prov:wasGeneratedBy.sc:description: LLM outputs were generated from counterfactual prompts, parsed into ranked recommendation lists, and scored using observable output-shift metrics, internal representation-shift metrics, and hidden-output quadrant assignment. The smoke artifact includes precomputed intermediate files for lightweight review.

prov:wasAttributedTo.prov:label: FairGap evaluation pipeline
prov:wasAttributedTo.sc:description: Automated scripts used for output parsing, metric computation, and quadrant assignment.
